title: Tool call card component that renders different views based on tool type
purpose: Displays tool call information in a card format with appropriate view components for different tool types, including read, write, bash, search, and generic MCP tools.
module_context: Exports a React component ToolCallCard that dynamically selects view components based on tool name and computes display titles from tool inputs.

steps.content: Check if the tool name starts with 'mcp__' prefix.
IF the name starts with 'mcp__', return the McpGenericView component.
ELSE use a switch statement to match the tool name to specific view components.
IF no match is found, return the JsonFallback component as default.
Extract the input object from the tool call item.
Define a helper function to convert values to strings if they are non-empty strings.
Use a switch statement to determine the appropriate title based on tool name.
For Read, Edit, MultiEdit, and Write tools, use the file path from input.
For Bash tools, use either the description or command from input.
For Grep and Glob tools, use the pattern from input.
For all other tools, return undefined as the title.
Determine the appropriate view component for the tool call based on its name.
Compute the display title for the tool call using its input data.
Calculate the duration of the tool call if both start and end timestamps are present.
Render the ToolCardFrame component with the tool name, computed title, status, duration, and historical flag.
Pass the tool call item to the selected view component as props.
